results.title: Celebrate Juneteenth 2026 in Massachusetts at these events
results.description: Here are four ways to celebrate Juneteenth across the Commonwealth.

results.title: NGO chief says 160 refugees in government housing
results.description: The head of an NGO supporting asylum seekers said that there 160 refugees are housed in government-run asylum centers.

results.title: Why Trump Thinks He's More Powerful Than Napoleon. This Post Is Key
results.description: The post, written by a ‘Dave King’, compared Trump’s influence with some of history’s most well-known rulers and military leaders, including William the Conqueror, Genghis Khan, Napoleon and Alexander the Great.

results.title: Karan Kundrra Responds To Trolls Over Seeking Parents’ Approval Before Proposing To Tejasswi Prakash: ‘If Not Family...’
results.description: Karan Kundrra has addressed criticism over reports that he consulted his parents before proposing to longtime partner Tejasswi Prakash. The actor's response has reignited a larger conversation online about modern relationships, family involvement in marriage decisions, and changing social expectations.

results.title: US lifts maritime blockade on Iranian ports and coastal areas
results.description: Last Updated on June 19, 2026 2:38 pm by INDIAN AWAAZ AMN/ WEB DESK The United States has lifted its maritime blockade on vessels entering and leaving Iranian ports and coastal areas. US Central Command (CENTCOM) has said that all enforcement operations have been halted in line with President Donald Trump’s directive. In a statement [...]
